journal_entry.reason: Record meal expense for employee working meeting paid by corporate credit card

output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez incurred a meal expense of $125 for a working meeting among employees, paid using the corporate credit card. This creates a meeting expense (debit) and a corresponding credit card payable liability (credit). The meal is consumed immediately and provides no future benefit, so it is expensed when incurred. No tax was mentioned in the transaction, so no tax lines are included.
